calls:
[addr.street, addr.city, addr.state, addr.zip]
        .filter(part => part) // Remove any null or undefined parts
        .join

orderModel
            .find({ restaurantId: restaurant._id })
            .sort({ date: -1 })
            .limit(limit)
            .populate('userId', 'firstName lastName email phone_number')
            .populate
